title: rosa × dumetorum var. subatrichostylis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. subatrichostylis, also known as the Rosa × dumetorum subatrichostylis or Rosa × dumetorum var. subatrichostylis, is a variety of the Rosa × dumetorum plant, which is a hybrid rose species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. subatrichostylis include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against various diseases and promote overall well-being. Rosa × dumetorum var. subatrichostylis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
